titleStmt.title: SII 24.49: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 49. (A.R. No. 12 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Records a sale of land to Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷap-Perumāḷ alias Irāva ••• Chōḻappallavaraiyaṉ under the orders of Śīriḷaṅgō Bhaṭṭar, the Śrīkāryam officer. Details lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari Akaḻcūḻnta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavum tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl ṇantu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayar muṉaik kon=taḷavaraiyar tan=taḷamiriya vāḷu
ṟai kaḻittut toḷ vali kāṭṭip porppari cūṭit tenticait temaru kamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭaiyum nannilappāvai tanimaiyum tavira vantu punitar tirumaṇi makuṭa murimaiyiṟ cūṭit tanṉaṭi Iraṇṭu n=taṭamuṭiyāka
ttonnila ventar cūṭa muṉṉai manuvā ppac ceṅkol ticai toṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunila viḷākat teṅkaṇun ta nātu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Orutani meruvil puli viḷaiyāṭa vār kaṭal tiyvāntarattup pūpālar tiṟai viṭu
tanta katañcorikaḷiṟu muṟaimaiyil niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennavan karuntalai paruntalait tiṭattan ponnakar puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa vinnāḷ piṟkulap piṟai pol niṟ piḻaiyeṉṉum colletir koṭiṟṟallatu tankai villetir koṭā vikkalan kalla
ttirai Aḷavuṟṟu veṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkariyum viṭṭa mānamu ṅkiṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷu mutukuneḷippa Iḻi
kuṭaticait tantāḷukantu tānum tānaiyum pannāḷiṭṭa pala pala mutuku payantetirmāṟi jayapperuntiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta puka(ḻ)ḻum celli yum vāḷāroṇkaṇ maṭantaiyar Iṭṭamu miḷḷātu kuṭutta ve
ṅkari niraiyum kaṅka maṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇi Iraṇṭum Oru vicaikkaik koṇṭu yiṇṭiya pukaḻ Oṭu pāṇṭi maṇṭalam koḷḷat tiruvuḷḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittalaṅkamu poruparittalaṅkamu pola tantiravārivuṭaittāy vantu vaṭal kaṭal teṅka
rvatu pol tan perum ceṉaiyai Evi (poruta) poruta porkkaḷattañci verineḷittoṭi Araṇenap pukkak kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vanacarar tiriyum koṟṟa veñcurame
ṟṟa vijayastampan ticaitoṟu niṟutti matta veṅkaripaṭum maiya caiyyamum kanniyum kai koṇṭaruḷit tennāṭṭellai Etun cāverellām tani vicum peṟa māveṟiya tan varutanit talaivarai kuṟu
poṅkoḷiyāramum tiruppuyattalaṅkaḷum polaviramu ntiyākavalli Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷ Iruppa Avaḷuṭan kaṅkai viṟṟiru ntan maṅkaiyar tilatam
muṭaiyyā yāḷḷoṭum viṟṟirun taruḷiya [ kovirājakecaripanmarāna] tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkolottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 munāvatu ciriḷaṅkopaṭṭar Ēval
vayiṣṇa ṭuvarāpati nampiyum perumpuli ttāṉamutum tiruvaraṅkappiccarum sura sura nampi tiruvaraṅkamāḷi paṇṭāravāriyam Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭa rīkanum pārata
taruvān kecuvan Aṟivariyānum tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇanum Āritan cirākan cikāri ṉum koyilka Ampalak kūttanāta nūṟṟuvappiriyanum Ārāvamu
Āḻvār kanmikaḷom tamacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu muḷḷi nāṭṭu pukuti purapukutiyūr ta veḷā n Irāva coḻappallavaraiyan Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap peru māḷukku
tirunanta kku meṟ kum melpāṟkellai malaikkiniya n tirunantavānat kellai vaṭapāṟkellai Ā
teṟkum ppaṟṟil
damaged
kkālukku paḷḷi koṇṭu varaṅka(n)num
Ippaṭikku pattiyūruṭaiyān Ippaṭikku villiyān patin Eṭṭu nāṭṭu śrī vayiṣṇava priyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi kuruvai Ippaṭikku kuruvai(y) Āri
Ippaṭikku Ivai kecuvan Eḻun=ta Ippaṭikku perum puliyūr vaṇṭuvarāpati nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku tiruvaraṅkappiccan Eḻuttu tiruvaraṅkamāḷi Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 24.49 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
